notes: Core mechanics (movement, jumping, climbing, barrels, hammers) are present but barrel physics are erratic, girder slope detection is unreliable causing Mario to fall through platforms, and the visual representation is very basic rectangles with no sprite fidelity to the original Donkey Kong arcade game.

The build is stable and mostly controllable, but it is only a simplified Donkey Kong approximation with limited enemy/stage behavior, rough ladder/platform interactions, and modest visual authenticity.
